name: ratchet-guide
title: Ratchet system guide
description: Shareable documentation pack for the Ratchet self-hosted AI build-and-verify control plane. Neutral illustrative RATCHET_ROOT paths only; no secrets, no real hostnames, no host operations runbooks or operator procedures.

documents.title: Ratchet system guide (v1.2) — pack index, start paths, and read order
Elevator pitch, happy-path flow, and component cheat sheet
System map, trust boundaries, end-to-end data flow
Load-bearing design rules: live is truth, proof of work, streaks, no secrets in builder env
Directory layout, environment files, project.json schema, and run workspace structure
The Ratchet loop contract, deploy strategies, mission YAML, exit codes, and verdict contract
Composer control-plane UI: Build home, queue builder, models, and unified nav
Optional overnight helpers: observe only, never implement product features
Credentials boundary: consumer broker shape and optional infra rules
Project shells, product /version requirements, and multi-step work
Pack scope: what this guide includes and deliberately excludes
Greenfield rebuild checklist in phases A–E
Paste-ready prompts for rebuild, new product, and friend share
Design pitfalls: contracts, boundaries, and fix directions
Mock loop, full local loop, mission YAML and project.json examples
Mermaid gallery: happy path, trust boundaries, loop state, vault sequence, rebuild phases
Single-sheet printable summary of the whole system
Print/PDF-friendly self-contained HTML rendering of the one-pager (letter, inline SVG, no external assets) — served at the extensionless clean URL; backed by one-pager-print.html
Documentation pack history and versioning notes
